name: Roast Loin of Pork
recipeIngredient: 5 lb Boneless Top Loin Roast, Pork
2 tbsp Ground Red Chiles, to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Place pork roast in a shallow glass or plastic dish.
2. Mix ground red chiles, lime juice, 1 teaspoon salt, cumin, oregano, pepper, garlic, and 1/4 cup of orange juice concentrate together.
3. Brush the mixture onto the pork roast. Cover and refrigerate for at least 8 hours.
4. Preheat oven to 325°F (165°C).
5. Place the pork, fat side up, on a rack in a shallow roasting pan.
6. Insert a meat thermometer so that the tip is in the center of the thickest part of the roast and does not touch the fat. Roast uncovered until the thermometer registers 170°F (77°C), about 2 to 2½ hours.
7. Remove pork and rack from the pan. Strain the drippings from the pan, discarding any fat.
8. Add enough water to the remaining orange juice concentrate to measure 3/4 cup. Stir in the juice and wine mixture into the strained drippings. Stir in sour cream and salt.
9. Serve with the pork roast.
